message:
feat(frankenpandas): expose merge_asof options + JoinExecutionOptions (fd90.217 / br-89h08)

Three fp-join exports were entirely hidden from frankenpandas — not
reachable via prelude OR top-level path:

- MergeAsofOptions (pub fields: allow_exact_matches, tolerance, by)
  matches pandas merge_asof parameters
- merge_asof_with_options (consumer of MergeAsofOptions)
- JoinExecutionOptions (use_arena, arena_budget_bytes — performance
  tuning for join_series)

merge_asof was already in the prelude as a 4-arg simple form, but
users wanting to tune tolerance, exact-match behavior, or grouped
asof via the `by` column had no way to reach the options-bearing
variant.

Fix:
- Add to top-level fp_join re-export
- Add to prelude module
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard with type-checks

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -212,6 +212,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-87ts","title":"fp-frame Series.drop_duplicates keep parameter parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T10:22:30.695390089Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T10:27:40.682457676Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T10:27:40.680483413Z","close_reason":"Already implemented at fp-frame/src/lib.rs:5403 (Series::drop_duplicates_keep)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-88cw","title":"pandas: fp-frame DataFrameGroupBy.transform list-of-funcs parity","description":"py signature:
df.groupby('k').transform(['sum', 'mean']) -> DataFrame (with columns {col}_{func})

Current DataFrameGroupBy.transform accepts a single func_name: &str; pandas also supports a list of funcs, returning one column per (input_col, func) broadcast back to the original row positions. Add transform_list(funcs: &[&str]) iterating each value column × each func, broadcasting the per-group aggregate to original rows and emitting {col}_{func} output columns.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T12:51:14.945858655Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T16:22:37.556041297Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T16:22:37.554116345Z","close_reason":"Already implemented in fp-frame; verified via dataframe_groupby_transform tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-88mp","title":"pandas: Series.str.removeprefix unicode parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-20T06:09:12.849132279Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T06:13:13.176998138Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T06:13:13.175188259Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-89h08","title":"fd90.217: Expose MergeAsofOptions + merge_asof_with_options + JoinExecutionOptions","description":"fd90.217: Expose MergeAsofOptions + merge_asof_with_options + JoinExecutionOptions to top-level + prelude.

Three fp-join exports are completely hidden from frankenpandas:

- MergeAsofOptions (pub fields: allow_exact_matches, tolerance, by) — README claims "match pandas merge_asof parameters". The simple merge_asof in the prelude defaults all of these.
- merge_asof_with_options (consumer of MergeAsofOptions)
- JoinExecutionOptions (use_arena, arena_budget_bytes — performance tuning for join_series)

User code following the README's pandas-compatibility claim that wants to tune asof tolerance:
    let options = MergeAsofOptions { tolerance: Some(60.0), ..Default::default() };
    merge_asof_with_options(&left, &right, "ts", AsofDirection::Backward, options)?

cannot resolve either type or function from frankenpandas (top-level OR prelude).

Scope:
- Add the 3 items to the top-level fp_join re-export
- Add the same 3 to the prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

Fields verified in HEAD; fp-frame clippy clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-8i9lh","title":"fd90.194: Integration test for README String Accessor section","description":"fd90.194: Add integration test for README "String Accessor" section (lines 439-453).

The .str() accessor exposes 50+ string operations matching pandas Series.str. Today only replace_regex (in readme_conditional_logic) is integration-tested. File a single test that hits one representative method per documented category.

Scope (one new test, one method per README category):
- Case: lower / upper / capitalize / title
- Whitespace: strip / lstrip / rstrip
- Search: contains / startswith / endswith
- Transform: slice / repeat / pad / zfill / center
- Split/Join: split_get / split_count / join
- Predicates: isdigit / isalpha
- Regex: contains_regex / extract / count_matches / findall / fullmatch
- Prefix/Suffix: removeprefix / removesuffix
- Other: len / get

Each invocation asserted to return a Series of the expected length; correctness is covered by per-method unit tests in fp-frame.

Files: crates/frankenpandas/tests/readme_quick_example.rs (one new test, ~80 lines).
Time estimate: 35-50min.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"test","created_at":"2026-04-26T19:50:11.308867804Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T19:52:08.080877268Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T19:52:08.078727838Z","close_reason":"Added readme_string_accessor_compiles_and_runs covering 26 string-accessor methods across all 9 categories documented in the README (case, whitespace, search, transform, split/join, predicates, regex, prefix/suffix, other). Per-method correctness covered by fp-frame unit tests; integration test asserts compile + return-shape contracts. All 33 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
